title: Celestial Metals
description:
Adds Celestial Metals, Ores, and more to Minecraft to spice up your progression!
NEW UPDATE: HASTE POTION!
body:
# Main Content
**JEI IS RECOMMENDED**

**INITIAL RELEASE**

Currently, the mod adds 2 materials, **Fundamental Bedrock [Generates close to bedrock at the bottom of the Overworld] and Sun Steel [Generates near the first deepslate layers, until bedrock.]**

Fundamental Bedrock requires a diamond pickaxe or greater to mine.

Sun Steel Requires Iron.

As the mod is still very early in development both materials don't have a great amount of utility, but the items and blocks you can craft with them are already quite useful, such as the Fundamental Bedrock Accelerator, which speeds up crop growth around it, and the Sun Steel Pickaxe, that auto-smelts ANYTHING it mines including non-stone materials.


**VERSION 1.0.5 RELEASE CHANGELOG:** 
Updated Sun Steel Sprite 
Added Deepslate Solar Remnant Variant 
Added Haste Potion! Brew it using Sun Steel on Awkward Potions
